summary: The diff introduces backend changes (main.mo) with OrderType including #RB, OrderStatus stages (Pending/Ready/Hallmark/ReturnFromHallmark), supplyOrder logic for partial supply, and an rbTotalTracker. However, the diff is truncated and there is no evidence of frontend changes — TotalOrdersTab grouped view, SuppliedQtyDialog UI integration, or frontend distinguishing of RB vs CO orders. The project_state.json marks AR-5/REQ-1 as still 'pending'. The backend structures appear partially correct, but several acceptance criteria cannot be verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: RB-type orders appear in TotalOrdersTab and can be distinguished from CO-type orders (frontend grouped view).
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files (TotalOrdersTab component or equivalent) are present in the diff. Only backend main.mo was modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Selecting RB orders and triggering supply opens the SuppliedQtyDialog, allowing partial quantities to be supplied while remaining units remain as Pending.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend SuppliedQtyDialog component changes are present in the diff. The UI flow for partial supply is not implemented in the provided changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: project_state.json marks REQ-1 as pending, suggesting the task was not completed.
missing_requirements.reason: The project_state.json shows AR-5 (REQ-1: Restore RB Order Logic) with status 'pending', indicating the feature was not marked as done.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration.mo module was added that performs a no-op migration (returns old state unchanged).
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration module. While it may be a necessary infrastructure piece, it was not requested in the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: An #SO (Special Order) variant was added to the OrderType type with a comment for future use.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only mentions restoring RB and CO order logic. The #SO type was not requested and is explicitly marked as future/unplanned.

hallucinated_features.description: An rbTotalTracker map (Map<Text, (Nat, Nat)>) was added to the actor state.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a total tracker data structure for RB orders. This appears to be an additional implementation detail not described in the requirements.
